# Earth Texture Assets

These texture files were copied from the local BaiLongma audit mirror at
`BaiLongma-audit/src/ui/brain-ui/vendor/earth/` for Noe's live world-surface
panel.

BaiLongma's `hotspot-earth.js` documents them as NASA and mrdoob/three.js public
earth textures. They are static browser assets only and must not contain runtime
state, owner data, or secrets.
